SELECT c1.created_at, c1.comment_text, c1.user_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.id <> 175 UNION ALL SELECT c2.created_at, c2.comment_text, c2.user_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.user_id > 32 LIMIT 19
SELECT p1.content, p1.id, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.id = 652 UNION SELECT p2.content, p2.id, p2.posted_at FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.id >= 65

SELECT l1.liked_at, l1.user_id, l1.post_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at >= DATETIME('now', '-29 days') UNION SELECT l2.liked_at, l2.user_id, l2.post_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.user_id <= 193 ORDER BY liked_at
SELECT f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id > 764 UNION SELECT f2.followee_id, f2.followed_at FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at > DATETIME('now', '-16 days')

SELECT u1.is_verified, u1.country_code, u1.email, u1.signup_date FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.country_code = 'test' UNION SELECT u2.is_verified, u2.country_code, u2.email, u2.signup_date FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.signup_date <= DATETIME('now', '-21 days') ORDER BY is_verified LIMIT 33

SELECT u1.country_code, u1.id, u1.email FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.signup_date < DATETIME('now', '-13 days') UNION SELECT u2.country_code, u2.id, u2.email FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-7 days')

SELECT f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id, f1.followed_at FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id >= 455 UNION SELECT f2.follower_id, f2.followee_id, f2.followed_at FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at > DATETIME('now', '-13 days')

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.followee_id = 113 UNION SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.follower_id, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at < DATETIME('now', '-15 days')

SELECT u1.signup_date, u1.email, u1.country_code, u1.username FROM users AS u1 WHERE u1.signup_date > DATETIME('now', '-25 days') UNION SELECT u2.signup_date, u2.email, u2.country_code, u2.username FROM users AS u2 WHERE u2.email = 'user97@example.com'

SELECT l1.post_id, l1.user_id FROM likes AS l1 WHERE l1.liked_at <= DATETIME('now', '-22 days') UNION SELECT l2.post_id, l2.user_id FROM likes AS l2 WHERE l2.liked_at > DATETIME('now', '-20 days') LIMIT 14

SELECT p1.id, p1.user_id, p1.posted_at FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.user_id = 842 UNION ALL SELECT p2.id, p2.user_id, p2.posted_at FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.posted_at <= DATETIME('now', '-2 days') ORDER BY id LIMIT 37

SELECT f1.followed_at, f1.follower_id, f1.followee_id FROM follows AS f1 WHERE f1.follower_id >= 862 UNION SELECT f2.followed_at, f2.follower_id, f2.followee_id FROM follows AS f2 WHERE f2.followed_at >= DATETIME('now', '-29 days') LIMIT 32

SELECT c1.post_id, c1.id, c1.comment_text, c1.created_at FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id < 299 UNION ALL SELECT c2.post_id, c2.id, c2.comment_text, c2.created_at FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.id > 275 ORDER BY post_id
SELECT p1.view_count, p1.user_id FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.content = 'test' UNION SELECT p2.view_count, p2.user_id FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.user_id > 243 ORDER BY view_count

SELECT p1.content, p1.user_id, p1.view_count FROM posts AS p1 WHERE p1.posted_at >= DATETIME('now', '-3 days') UNION SELECT p2.content, p2.user_id, p2.view_count FROM posts AS p2 WHERE p2.user_id > 216

SELECT c1.id, c1.user_id, c1.created_at, c1.post_id FROM comments AS c1 WHERE c1.user_id < 909 UNION ALL SELECT c2.id, c2.user_id, c2.created_at, c2.post_id FROM comments AS c2 WHERE c2.comment_text = 'test' LIMIT 48
